arts.ttl: Sven Botman eyeing early return date as uplifting Newcastle United images emerge
arts.sum: Newcastle United centre-back Sven Botman has taken another significant step back towards the first team picture with the Magpies. Howe was eager for both Matt Targett and Lewis Miley to get minutes in their legs on Friday night rather than travel to London with the first-team squad.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe given green light to make huge Newcastle United midfield changes at Palace
arts.sum: Newcastle United could make some key changes to their starting XI for today's Premier League with Crystal Palace - with midfield the main focus of attention. Not only is Tonali restored to the starting XI, but Harvey Barnes comes into our fans' team, with Joelinton and Joe Willock dropping the bench.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Eddie Howe will be hoping Newcastle United can end their frustrating inconsistency this season. The Magpies appeared to be on an upward curve after impressive wins over Chelsea, Arsenal and Nottingham Forest, but last weekend saw a step back after defeat to West Ham at St James’ Park. Newcastle have dropped to 10th in the […] The post Newcastle XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United want to complete 'uncomplicated' deal that has Eddie Howe's blessing
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Fabian Schar is poised to extend his stay on Tyneside by signing a contract extension in the near future. The former Basel star admits there has never been any possibility of swapping Newcastle for any other club since Howe's arrival, with his situation as uncomplicated as ever heading into the final seven months of his deal.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United defender attracting January interest from Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Newcastle United club captain Jamaal Lascelles is believed to be on Wolverhampton Wanderers' January wish-list. Speaking about his fitness levels, Newcastle captain Lascelles said last month: "In terms of my recovery from my ACL injury, I'm well over the worst now.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Transfer Talk Update: Marc Guehi, Michael Olise, Liam Delap
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Howe must resist Newcastle temptation at Crystal Palace with one change planned
arts.sum: A back five of Nick Pope, Tino Livramento, Fabian Schar, Dan Burn and Lewis Hall has looked the perfect formula so far this term, with Lloyd Kelly failing to cover himself in glory for both West Ham's goals earlier in the week. Dan Burn returning for Lloyd Kelly could well be the only rotation we see from Howe after he praised his side for the majority of their performance in the recent 2-0 defeat.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Crystal Palace as Eddie Howe weighs up changes
arts.sum: Newcastle United squad vs Crystal Palace: Pope, Dubravka, Vlachodimos, Ruddy, Trippier, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall, Kelly, Targett, Guimaraes, Tonali, Longstaff, Joelinton, Willock, Barnes, Murphy, Almiron, Gordon, Osula, Wilson, Isak. Bruno Guimaraes and Joe Willock will have late fitness tests after both were forced off with injuries against West Ham. Both have travelled with the squad, however, and Howe is optimistic they will be involved today.

arts.ttl: Is Crystal Palace vs Newcastle United on TV, when is kick-off and how can I follow it?
arts.sum: Selhurst Park has not been a hugely happy hunting ground for Newcastle United as they prepare for today's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace. With Liverpool up next, this is a match Newcastle need to win to keep give their European hopes a boost and prove the West Ham result was just a blip.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United legend raises concerns over Eddie Howe tactical identity
arts.sum: "Newcastle struggled to break them down in the second half, West Ham played the way they wanted to play and got a fantastic win." Nolan has watched Newcastle closely this season and the former skipper feels that they may be better suited to playing on the counter attack.
